T0102.title: Social Engineering Database
T0102.definition: A database containing extensive personal or organizational information that may be gathered from public sources, data breaches, social media, or other channels. By building a comprehensive social engineering database, attackers can conduct more targeted operations and significantly increase their chances of success.
